<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="hi">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>InstaChat</title>
<link rel="icon" href="data:," />
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background: #F3F3F3; }
  #recaptcha-container { position: fixed; bottom: -100px; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="root"></div>
<div id="recaptcha-container"></div>

<!-- React -->
<script src="https://unpkg.com/react@18/umd/react.production.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/react-dom@18/umd/react-dom.production.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/@babel/standalone/babel.min.js"></script>

<!-- Firebase (compat SDK, no build tool needed) -->
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.7.1/firebase-app-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.7.1/firebase-auth-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.7.1/firebase-firestore-compat.js"></script>

<script>
  // ---- Tumhara real Firebase config ----
  const firebaseConfig = {
    apiKey: "AIzaSyADaGrquI9IVS79lmtKwRA53p0uBqtCYI0",
    authDomain: "instachat-official.firebaseapp.com",
    projectId: "instachat-official",
    storageBucket: "instachat-official.firebasestorage.app",
    messagingSenderId: "268835402085",
    appId: "1:268835402085:web:5bdd493c99c94dddccf18c"
  };
  firebase.initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
  const auth = firebase.auth();
  const db = firebase.firestore();
</script>

<script type="text/babel" data-presets="react">
const { useState, useEffect, useRef } = React;

/* ---------- Design tokens ---------- */
const C = {
  sky: "#5EC2F0", skyDeep: "#2FA8E0", pink: "#FF9FCE", pinkDeep: "#FF6FB0",
  ink: "#1C1C1E", sub: "#8E8E93", bg: "#FFFFFF", card: "#FAFAFA", border: "#EFEFEF",
};
const GRAD = `linear-gradient(135deg, ${C.pink}, ${C.sky})`;
const F_DISPLAY = "'Poppins', sans-serif";
const F_BODY = "'Inter', sans-serif";
const LOGO_URI = "data:image/png;base64,
